name: Hunan Aihua Group Co., Ltd
summary: Hunan Aihua Group Co., Ltd engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of aluminum electrolytic capacitors in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company also manufactures aluminum foil and machines. It serves lighting, new energy, telecom, industrial, automotive, computer, home applications, and medical markets. Hunan Aihua Group Co., Ltd was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Yiyang, the People's Republic of China.
